raw_consumer_statement:
contacted citibank double cash back credit card on the XXXX saying to them I did not make 3 purchases. They said they will dispute them. At first they only disputed the XXXX and XXXX from snow.com. I called back to say the XXXX of XXXX from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX CAN is also not from me. 

I checked back 6 days later, the XXXX and XXXX are my fault. and the XXXX was not even disputed. they agreed to reopen the dispute but I am not confident they will reverse their stance. 

these places are outside of the country and I can't leave the country.
